titleStmt.title: SII 26.204: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 204. (A.R. No. 192 of 1909.) AVANĀSHI, AVANASHI TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records an endowment of 14 Paḻañjalākai achchu in the temple of Avināśiyāḷuḍaiyār, by the prince Nachchināṟkkiniyar alias Kaṇḍiyadēvar, for oil for bathing the image of the god Āvināśiyāḷuḍaiyār and of the goddess Peruṅkaruṇaichchelviyār of the Tirukkāmakkōṭṭam on Saturdays and also for giving to the people suffering from diseases. It is stipulated that the servants of deity, on receipt of the endowment, should measure out every Saturday the specified quantity of oil at the shrine of the goddess.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī virarāce
ntiratevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatteṭṭāvatu Ulakuṭai
pperumāḷ virarācentiratevar tirumakanār naccināṟ
k kiniyārāna kaṇṭiyatevar Āḷuṭaiyar Avināciyā
ḷuṭaiyar tirukkāmakkoṭṭanācciyar peruṅkaruṇai
ccelviyāṟkuc ceyta tanmamāvatu cani Eṇṇaik
kāppu nāyanāṟkuc cani Onṟukku Eṇṇai Uriyum
nācciyāṟku Uriyum Ālaṟkku vaḻaṅka Eṇṇai Iru
nāḻiyum Ākaccanti Onṟukkup parakecariyāl Eṇṇai mun
nāḻiyum Āka Āṇṭonṟukkuc cani Aimpattaiñcu
kku Eṇṇai kalane Irutūṇi Aññāḻikku Avināciyā
ḷuṭaiyar śrī paṇṭārattil Oṭukkina paḻañcalākai Ac
cup patinālil Upaiyaṅkoṇṭu canitoṟum nācciyar
tirumuṉpe nāyanār tevarkanmikaḷ Aḷantu varuvatāka Ippa
ṭi cantirātittavarai celvatāka Itu panmāhe
śvararakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 26.204 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
